mechanics.excerpt: Subpaths Some paths include' various subpaths that represent extension or specialized focus of the path in question. In many ways_ subpaths function as variants on the main path. Some subpaths are mandatory; characters must take them after fol: lowing the main path (as indicated under Next Path) .
